MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendant Green Chile Kitchen And Market Llc Dba Green Chile Kitchen
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendant Green Chile Kitchen And Market Llc Dba Green Chile Kitchen.

Plaintiff Oakville Produce Partners LLC's motion for entry of court judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)
